title: Levyathan - REKT
relevance_summary: Private key exposure leading to token minting and subsequent withdrawal bug

prevention.rule: Block any tx that mints tokens and then immediately calls a withdrawal function.

attacker_addresses: Not explicitly mentioned in the article
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that mints tokens and then immediately calls a withdrawal function.
summary: Levyathan.finance was hacked due to private keys being exposed on Github, allowing attackers to mint tokens and exploit a bug in the withdrawal mechanism. A guard could have detected and blocked such transactions.
